fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate` pairs a variation axis tag with a specific design-space value, forming a single coordinate in a variable font's design space. Use a span of these structs as <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments.VariationDesignPosition> to position a typeface clone along one or more axes.

This struct is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var coords = new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate[]
{
    new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate { Axis = SKFourByteTag.Parse("wght"), Value = 700 },
    new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate { Axis = SKFourByteTag.Parse("ital"), Value = 1 },
};
var args = new SKFontArguments { VariationDesignPosition = coords };
using var face = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Specifies a design-space coordinate for a single variation axis in a variable font.

fields.value: The four-byte tag identifying the variation axis.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the tag of the variation axis this coordinate applies to.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the two instances are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the design-space value for the variation axis.
